name: SmartJanja
description:
Smart Janja is a powerful, offline-first digital business management solution developed by TMG Platform, designed to transform how small and medium-sized businesses manage their daily operations.
The platform enables business owners to record their sales effortlessly and automatically generates accurate, real-time reports—daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly—without requiring any manual calculations or accounting expertise.
Built specifically for accessibility and real-world environments, Smart Janja works seamlessly without internet connectivity and is completely free to use, making it highly practical for small-scale traders operating in low-resource settings.
By converting simple sales inputs into clear business insights, Smart Janja empowers entrepreneurs to understand their performance, make smarter decisions, and grow sustainably.
More than just a tool, Smart Janja is a step toward digitizing informal businesses and unlocking their potential in the modern digital economy.
